market_pulse: Competitive venues ramping up mid-week talent and pushing strong IG/TT presence; LIV holding steady with consistent artist announcements through weekend.

content_gaps.description: Multiple competitors (OMNIA, Zouk, Hakkasan) using countdown story cadence and flash countdown teasers; LIV presence on stories underrepresented.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Increase story frequency 3x/day with 24-48h countdown mechanics for weekend lineups; match competitor story velocity.

content_gaps.description: XS, Encore, and Hakkasan aggressively reposting user content and guest experiences; LIV Instagram shows fewer UGC repostings.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Launch UGC repost campaign targeting @livnightclub hashtag; create dedicated weekly UGC story series.

content_gaps.description: Hakkasan running R&B Wednesdays with consistent messaging; Zouk has Ian Asher (Fri 6/26), James Hype (Sat 6/27). LIV mid-week activity harder to track.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Emphasize mid-week DJ series in content calendar; push Wednesday/Thursday artist posts with dedicated promo cadence.

influencer_activity.mention: LIV Las Vegas official account showing Kehlani (Fri 6/19), Gorgon City (Sat 6/20), Four Color Zack (Sun 6/21). Strong weekend lineup with mixed genre positioning.
XS Las Vegas posting Kaskade (Fri 6/12), The Chainsmokers (Sat 6/13). Recent entrance updates and active TikTok presence indicates strong promotional push.
OMNIA announcing Steve Aoki (Wed 6/19), DJ Paulyd (Thu 6/20), Yo Yo Lie (Fri 6/21). Strong mid-week talent + weekend positioning.
Hakkasan posting NiikoXSwae (Tue 6/18), Justin Credible (Wed 6/19), DJ Drama (Thu 6/20), R&Bae Wednesdays (6/24). Active weekly content and recurring theme nights.
Zouk Group announcing Ian Asher (Fri 6/26), James Hype (Sat 6/27) with Ayuda Club integration. Cross-promotions and sister-venue synergy evident.
Encore Beach Club showing active pool party positioning with heavy emphasis on talent bookings. Limited specific June posts but strong follower base (284K).
TAO Beach showing mixed content strategy with limited recent updates. FISHER booking mentioned in TT content; 96K followers.
Palm Tree Beach Club (MGM partnership with Tao Group) limited activity; newer venue with building presence.

story_activity.summary: Steve Aoki, DJ Paulyd, Yo Yo Lie weekend lineup prominently featured across IG story/feed with Caesars Palace co-branding.
Mid-week artist announcements (NiikoXSwae Tue, Justin Credible Wed, DJ Drama Thu) with recurring R&Bae Wednesdays positioning.
Ian Asher (Fri 6/26) and James Hype (Sat 6/27) with sister-venue synergy (@ayudayclub cross-promotion).

venues.summary: Weekend talent lineup (Kehlani, Gorgon City, Four Color Zack) with strong IG presence; mid-week activity less visible.

raw_posts.content_summary: Kehlani performing Friday, June 19 at LIV Nightclub. Weekend kickoff with mixed electronic/pop positioning.
Gorgon City performing Saturday, June 20. Continued weekend momentum with dance/house focus.
Four Color Zack performing Sunday, June 21. Weekend completion with mixed genre flexibility.

venues.summary: Summer dayclub positioning with pool/beach aesthetic; recent posts from early June showing opening-season momentum.

raw_posts.content_summary: David Guetta performance during EDC Week driving major engagement. Pool season positioning and cabana reservation promotion (@livbeach doorpass.me links).
Apres Beach party content showing staff/uniform branding. Summer/après-ski theming with Fontainebleau integration.

venues.summary: Strong mid-June talent (Kaskade, The Chainsmokers) with recent entrance updates indicating active venue refresh and heavy TikTok/IG presence.

raw_posts.content_summary: Kaskade performing Friday, June 12 at XS. Strong electronic/dance positioning with 305K-follower reach.
The Chainsmokers performing Saturday, June 13. Continued high-profile talent with strong crossover appeal.

venues.summary: Daytime pool positioning with 284K followers; limited recent activity but strong infrastructure and historic high-engagement posts.

raw_posts.content_summary: Generic pool club positioning emphasizing venue atmosphere and lifestyle content. Limited specific June artist announcements detected.

venues.summary: Strong mid-week to weekend talent (Steve Aoki Wed, DJ Paulyd Thu, Yo Yo Lie Fri) with aggressive booking strategy and Caesars Palace co-marketing.

DJ Paulyd performing Thursday, June 20. Extended weekend ramp-up with deeper house/tech positioning.
Yo Yo Lie performing Friday, June 21. Weekend kick with mixed genre flexibility. 464K follower account with high authority.

Active late-June talent (Ian Asher Fri 6/26, James Hype Sat 6/27) with sister-venue integration (Ayuda Club); Resorts World positioning.

James Hype performing Saturday, June 27. Sister-venue promotions and network effects with Zouk Group portfolio.

venues.summary: Aggressive mid-week + weekend talent (NiikoXSwae Tue, Justin Credible Wed, DJ Drama Thu) with recurring R&Bae Wednesdays branding; 255K followers; MGM Grand positioning.

Justin Credible performing Wednesday, June 19. Mid-week momentum continuation with recurring R&Bae Wednesdays theme.
DJ Drama performing Thursday, June 20. Extended mid-week ramp into weekend with hip-hop/rap positioning.
R&Bae Wednesdays recurring weekly theme (6/24 referenced). Branded recurring night with consistent positioning and audience expectation-setting.

venues.summary: New venue (opened May 2026) with Kygo/Tao Group positioning at MGM Grand. Limited social activity detected; building presence.
Rooftop pool positioning at The Venetian with limited recent June posts; FISHER booking referenced in TT content. 96K followers with mixed activity.

raw_posts.content_summary: FISHER performing at TAO Beach with Tiësto reference and Venetian location branding. Limited recent IG presence but TT mentions indicate continued bookings.
